title: Universal Asset Metadata
description: Frontmatter convention applied across squads, businesses, mind-clones, research, decisions, briefs, outputs and tasks. Read by ~/.claude/skills/_shared/lib/asset-meta.js. Backwards-compatible: legacy v2 (nested) and v4 (flat) task formats remain valid; this schema describes the OPTIONAL universal fields a callers may also set.

type.description: Asset class. Drives graph-view coloring and cross-document lint scope.

slug.description: Stable kebab-case identifier. Should match the directory or file basename when applicable.

title.description: Human-readable title, used for graph node labels and search.

updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last meaningful update.

links.description: Outbound cross-references by slug. Drives graph edges and lint cross-document scope.
